isolation.notes: Next.js dev server on port 3000, no shared mutable state, all data hardcoded

assertions.title: Blog listing page renders with article grid

steps.observed: Blog listing page loaded with title 'From the Kitchen'

steps.expected: Article cards with images, category labels, titles, excerpts, and Read More links
steps.observed: Article cards displayed in 3-column grid with images, category labels (SOUL FOOD HERITAGE, NUTRITION, WELLNESS, RECIPES), titles, excerpts, date/read time metadata, and 'READ MORE >' links

steps.action: Verify category filter tabs are present
steps.expected: Category tabs displayed (All, Recipes, Wellness, Soul Food Heritage, Nutrition)
steps.observed: All five category tabs displayed with 'All' initially active (filled style)

steps.expected: Articles filtered to show only Recipes category
steps.observed: 'Recipes' tab became active (filled style), displayed articles filtered to only show Recipes category articles: 'Chef Kyla's Rainbow Power Bowl', 'Spicy Sweet Potato & Coconut Soup', 'Herb-Crusted Salmon with Citrus Glaze' — all labeled RECIPES

evidence.network: Client-side filtering, no additional network requests

steps.action: Click on 'Chef Kyla's Rainbow Power Bowl' article from blog listing
steps.observed: Navigated to article detail page successfully

steps.expected: Article title, category, author, hero image displayed
steps.observed: Displayed: category label 'RECIPES' in terracotta, title 'Chef Kyla's Rainbow Power Bowl', author 'By Chef Kyla', date 'February 19, 2025', read time '4 min read', and large hero image of the power bowl

steps.action: Scroll down to verify rich text content
steps.expected: Rich text content with paragraphs and headings
steps.observed: Rich text body content displayed with paragraph text and subheading 'The Foundation: Ancient Grains'
'Related Articles' section at bottom with 3 article cards
Recipes page loaded with title 'Recipes' and subtitle text

steps.expected: Recipe cards with images, titles, and links to recipe detail pages
steps.observed: 9 recipe cards displayed in 3-column grid with images, difficulty badges (EASY/MEDIUM), category labels (BOWLS, DRINKS, MAINS, SOUPS, SNACKS), titles, descriptions, and metadata (prep time, servings, difficulty). All cards are links to detail pages.

steps.action: Click on 'Rainbow Power Bowl' recipe card
steps.observed: Recipe detail page loaded successfully showing description, prep/cook time, servings, difficulty badge, and hero image

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed. Blog listing page renders article cards correctly with all required elements. Category filtering works (tested Recipes filter). Blog article detail pages display title, category, author, hero image, and rich text content. Recipes section displays recipe cards with images, titles, metadata, and working links to detail pages.
